text:
"Wrath" may refer to the following:
King Bradley, the Führer of Amestris who is later revealed to be a Homunculus and the embodiment of some of Father's wrath in the original manga and 2009 anime.
Wrath (2003 Anime), a Homunculus exclusive to the 2003 anime adaptation who is revealed to be the offspring of Izumi and Sig Curtis.
